afflictions.name: Paralysis
afflictions.description: Your muscles seize, preventing physical movement.

afflictions.name: Blindness
afflictions.description: You cannot see your enemy's movements.

afflictions.name: Stupidity
afflictions.description: Your mind is clouded, preventing complex thoughts.

afflictions.name: Broken Limbs
afflictions.description: A shattered bone makes every movement agony.

afflictions.name: Burning
afflictions.description: Your flesh is scorched by thermal currents.

afflictions.name: Frostbite
afflictions.description: Ice crystals damage your nervous system.

afflictions.name: Heavy Burden
afflictions.description: The weight of the world is literally crushing you.

afflictions.name: Mental Dissonance
afflictions.description: Multiple voices scream in your mind simultaneously.

spells.name: Thermal Flare [FLAME]
spells.description: A rapid excitation of air particles, manifesting as a burst of flame.

spells.name: Vector Crush [STONE]
spells.description: A localized spike in gravimetric weight manifesting as crushing pressure.

spells.name: Biomorphic Frost [ICE]
spells.description: A targeted neural breakdown that flash-freezes cellular activity.

spells.name: Cognitive Static [VOID]
spells.description: A sensory phonic disruptor that leaves the target confused and uncoordinated.
